en.title: Example Reward Vault
en.subtitle: Deposit tokens, watch the reward clock, and claim from a controlled Flap Vault UI.
en.sections.rewardStatusDescription: A compact business dashboard inspired by the NiePan Vault reference: mechanism first, primary metrics second, actions only after users can read the current state.
en.sections.rewardWindowHint: Reward timing is refreshed from the Vault together with balances and oracle data.
en.sections.actionDescription: Approve, deposit, and claim inside one controlled action panel with clear balance, allowance, and stage states.
en.flow.description: The default example keeps the business flow visible: users deposit the active token, the Vault tracks reward timing, then claimable rewards become available after contract and oracle state are refreshed.
en.states.connectWallet: Connect a wallet from the host header before sending transactions.
en.states.wrongNetwork: Switch wallet to {chain} before using this Vault.
en.states.actionsUnavailable: This action is unavailable in the current market phase.
en.notices.previewData: Preview fixture data is active because the route is using the template's neutral preview addresses.
en.notices.riskMissing: This Vault UI must integrate the current contract risk status before delivery. Read riskLevel from host Vault/TaxInfo context and display it prominently.
en.notices.actionStageBoth: This default example is available in both internal-market and DEX-listed phases. For a real Vault, keep the action panel visible and disable only the controls blocked by the current phase.
en.notices.safety: This example intentionally uses no custom images or direct wallet access. Oracle usage is surfaced by vault:check for Flap review, while transactions use runtime context addresses and the approve / simulate / write / refetch flow.
en.errors.amountRequired: Enter an amount greater than zero.
en.errors.insufficientFunds: Insufficient wallet balance to complete this transaction.
en.errors.walletDisconnected: Connect a wallet before sending this transaction.
en.errors.simulationFailed: The transaction could not pass simulation.
en.errors.readFailed: Unable to refresh Vault data right now.

zh.title: 示例奖励 Vault
zh.subtitle: 存入代币、查看奖励倒计时，并通过受控 Flap Vault UI 领取奖励。
zh.sections.rewardStatusDescription: 参考 NiePan Vault 的展示方式：先展示运行机制，再展示关键指标，用户读清当前状态后再进入操作。
zh.sections.rewardWindowHint: 奖励时间会和余额、Oracle 数据一起从 Vault 刷新。
zh.sections.actionDescription: 授权、存入、领取集中在一个受控操作面板里，并清楚展示余额、授权和阶段状态。
zh.flow.description: 默认示例会把业务路径展示清楚：用户存入当前代币，Vault 跟踪奖励时间，合约和 Oracle 状态刷新后，可领取奖励会进入操作区。
zh.states.connectWallet: 请先在宿主页面顶部连接钱包，再发起交易。
zh.states.wrongNetwork: 请先把钱包切换到 {chain}，再使用这个 Vault。
zh.states.actionsUnavailable: 当前市场阶段暂不可执行这个操作。
zh.notices.previewData: 当前路由使用模板的中性预览地址，因此启用了预览 fixture 数据。
zh.notices.riskMissing: 这个 Vault UI 必须接入当前合约风险状态后才能交付。请从 host Vault/TaxInfo context 读取 riskLevel，并在界面中显著展示。
zh.notices.actionStageBoth: 这个默认示例在内盘阶段和 Listing 后都可用。真实 Vault 请保持操作区可见，并只禁用当前阶段被阻止的控件。
zh.notices.safety: 这个示例刻意不使用自定义图片，也不直接访问钱包。Oracle 使用由 vault:check 提示给 Flap 审查，交易使用运行时地址，并展示 approve / simulate / write / refetch 流程。
zh.errors.amountRequired: 请输入大于 0 的数量。
zh.errors.insufficientFunds: 钱包余额不足，无法完成这笔交易。
zh.errors.walletDisconnected: 请先连接钱包后再发起交易。
zh.errors.userRejected: 你已取消这次钱包签名请求。
zh.errors.simulationFailed: 这笔交易没有通过模拟检查。
zh.errors.readFailed: 暂时无法刷新 Vault 数据。
